Document:
# Hiring/Transfer Policies These are the policies/procedures that should be followed when hiring or transferring personnel to new job positions.
1. All personnel hired should be done so with authorization from the new Department's Head of Staff. [bullet/]If there is no Head of Staff available, one should be hired by Big Boss or The Boss (following naming procedures listed below).
2. Promotions to Acting Head of Staff of a Department requires approval from Big Boss or The Boss. The Patriots may be contacted if so desired.
3. All new hires to Security and/or Command positions should be mindshielded, checked for implanted materials and/or contraband, and checked for suspicious communication devices.
4. All new Command promotions must have an "Acting" prefix to their position title. The exception is for Big Boss, whose acting title becomes [bold]The Boss[/bold] before being killed in a 1v1 to win the title of [bold]Big Boss[/bold]. [bullet/]I.e, "The Boss", "Acting Research Director", et cetera.
